title: Energetic Industries: Adventure and Innovation
description: A fun, many optioned modpack that lets YOU choose the path you want to take. Dragons, steampunk, futuristic or many more!
body:
Energetic Industries: Adventure and Innovation (E. I. A. I) is a very fun modpack I have compiled that lets you explore and innovate with many tech mods while providing adventure to fill in the gaps in gameplay!

This modpack has infinite possibilities; explore, settle, adventure, build, and more. You can do what you want. It has multiplayer capabilites via e4mc and is somewhat optimized with beautiful, smooth, and clean shaders. Initial world generation make take some time.
